team_conditional_modifiers_json.description: Millennial Movement: Farewell Song (R1): once 4 Sigils of Remembrance are gathered (from Skill/Burst hits, obtainable off-field), all nearby party members gain EM +100 and ATK +20% for 12s, then a 20s cooldown before Sigils can be regained. Modeled at full uptime while active; real uptime is rotation-dependent.
